= Contributing to IDApTIK

Thanks for your interest in IDApTIK. This document covers the mechanics of
contributing; see `CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md` for community expectations and
`MAINTAINERS` for who reviews and merges.

== Developer Certificate of Origin

All commits must be signed off under the Developer Certificate of Origin
(DCO) 1.1:

[source,shell]
----
git commit -s
----

This certifies that you wrote the change, or otherwise have the right to
submit it under the project's licence. Unsigned commits will not be merged.

== Licensing of contributions

IDApTIK uses layered licensing — do not submit changes that flatten or
relicense a layer without maintainer sign-off:

* Engine and code: AGPL-3.0-or-later
* Game content: CC-BY-SA-4.0
* Names/marks (IDApTIK, Moletaire): trademarked, not covered by the above

== Sensitive areas

Changes to `crates/idaptik-ffi` (the C-ABI surface for Zig/Idris2 consumers)
and `server/` (the network-facing Elixir/OTP session relay) receive extra
review — see `PROJECT-GOVERNANCE-BINDING.adoc` for the current sensitive-area
list and review authority.

== Review and decision authority

Pull requests are reviewed and merged by the maintainers listed in
`MAINTAINERS`. Decision-making tiers (minor/major/breaking changes) are
described in `GOVERNANCE.md`.
